sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Jesuh min bang zahin ngaih hiam,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: ‘Jesuh’ kici min manpha, phat tek ni,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ka lungsim le ka dahna teng,
A theikhin pa’ min ngaih ka

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Tua min ngaih ka zaza nuam
Ka lungsim hong nopsak khial kei;

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Kuamah’n gen thei ngei het lo hi,
Tua ka it min, bangzah’n ngaih
Aw tua min phatna bek ging hi,
Jesuh A min phat ve un.
